name: uiautomation
description: BDD UI automation demo for Sauce Demo using Cucumber and Playwright browser automation

scripts.test:bdd: cucumber-js tests/features --tags "not @manual" --require-module ts-node/register --require tests/support/**/*.ts --require tests/steps/**/*.ts --format progress --format html:reports/cucumber-report.html --format json:reports/cucumber-report.json
